## Checklist

- [ ] Branch follows git-flow (`feature/*` → `development`, `hotfix/*` → `master`)
- [ ] Linked issue + milestone + label
- [ ] PR body contains `Closes #N`
- [ ] No direct commits to protected branches
- [ ] Reviewer dispatch ran (`wtf-code-reviewer`)
